---
title: "Clear Communication, Courageous Conversations"
author: "Interpersonal Communication"
description: "This session is designed to strengthen participants’ communication skills and build capacity to engage in candid, sometimes difficult conversations about sensitive topics or conflicts with clarity, empathy, and effectiveness."
categories: ["TBD"]
---

## Session Materials

To visit this session's materials, click [here](https://legacyworksgroup.github.io/interpersonal-comm/content/courage.html) or see below.

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://legacyworksgroup.github.io/interpersonal-comm/content/courage.html" height="550" width="800" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```
